channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Fire in Delhi hotel kills at least 21
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- At least 21 people, mostly foreign nationals, killed in New Delhi hotel fire, police say
- At least 21, mostly foreign nationals, dead in fire at India hotel
- Delhi hotel fire kills 21
- 21 people killed in New Delhi hotel fire, says police
- Fire at a New Delhi Hotel Kills at Least 21
- Fire at Delhi restaurant leaves 21 dead including foreigners
- At least 18 foreign nationals among 21 killed in Delhi hotel fire
- At least 18 foreign nationals among 21 killed in Delhi hotel fire
- 18 foreigners among 21 killed in New Delhi hotel fire
- New Delhi hotel fire kills at least 21: police
- Fire at New Delhi hotel kills at least 21 people
- Foreign nationals among 21 dead in fire in Indian capital
- Foreign nationals among at least 21 killed in Delhi fire
- 21 killed in hotel fire in New Delhi, many victims reported to be foreigners
- Fire in Delhi hotel kills at least 21, police say
- Fire at a New Delhi Hotel Kills at Least 21
- 21, mostly foreigners, killed in Delhi hotel fire
- New Delhi hotel fire kills at least 21]]>

- Drone strike kills 7 as passenger bus targeted in eastern Ukraine
- Drone strike kills 7 on bus in Russia-held eastern Ukraine

- Seven killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine
- 7 killed, 11 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on bus in Donetsk: regional leader
- Ukrainian drone kills seven civilians on Moscow-Crimea bus – governor
- Russia-installed Donetsk region leader says 7 killed, 11 wounded after drone hits bus]]>
